extracted.title: VCP Meter Underperformance
extracted.description:
Valley Crossing Pipeline's, LLC (VCP) system has limited ability to absorb due pipeline imbalances from receipt and/or delivery point operators. VCP is requiring the following meter operator to perform to scheduled quantities or confirmation restrictions will be made commensurate with anticipated physical deliveries:

Loc: 40832 | Loc Name: WHISTLER PIPELINE | County: Nueces | Loc St: TX

If immediate action is not taken by the meter operator by 2:00 PM CCT, reductions for Gas Day January 24, 2026, may be required.

VCP will continue to monitor performance at this meter for future gas days.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.
